title: 10 Ways a Godly Man Leads Before He Has the Title
caption:
Leadership isn't a title. It's a pattern.

He apologizes first, even when he only owns half of it. He shows up when it costs him something. He says the hard thing to someone's face, privately, before it becomes a wound. He prays for the men around him by name.

He takes responsibility for outcomes, not just intentions. "I meant well" doesn't lead anyone anywhere. He's first to serve when no one's keeping score. He protects the reputation of people who aren't in the room — because the man who gossips to you about others will gossip about you.

He keeps his word to himself before he keeps it to anyone else. He asks questions before he gives answers. And he goes first into the thing everyone's afraid of.

Leadership without cost is management. The cross came before the crown.

Save this and send it to one man who's trying to lead well.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #servantleadership #thevision #christianity #realtalk
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
